zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton於大約1463年出生時，他的父親Sir Henry Langton44歲，母親Elizabeth Balderston33歲。他於大約1474年與Lady Isabella Gerard結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他去世於1500年8月23日在英國藍卡爾沃爾頓勒-達爾享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃爾頓勒-達爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton于大约1463年出生时，他的父亲Sir Henry Langton44岁，母亲Elizabeth Balderston33岁。他于大约1474年与Lady Isabella Gerard结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他去世于1500年8月23日在英国藍卡爾沃爾頓勒-達爾享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃爾頓勒-達爾。

nameMeanings.name: Langton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Langton Hall in Kirkby in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), Langton Lodge in Hendon (Middlesex), Langton (Yorkshire), East and West Langton (Leicestershire), Langton by Horncastle, Langton by Spilsby, and Langton by Wragby (all in Lincolnshire), and Lanton (Northumb). Compare Lankton , Lanton , and Longton .

variants.name: Lankton
meanings: History: Thomas Lankton, born c. 1714 in Hartford County, CT, died 1783 in Litchfield County, CT, was a son of Joseph Langton.

variants.name: Longton
meanings: habitational name from Longton in Lancashire. The placename derives from Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton was born about 1463, his father, Sir Henry Langton, was 44 and his mother, Elizabeth Balderston, was 33. He married Lady Isabella Gerard about 1474. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 10 daughters. He died on 23 August 1500, in Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton est né environ 1463, son père, Sir Henry Langton, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Balderston, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Lady Isabella Gerard environ 1474. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 10 filles. Il est décédé le 23 août 1500, à Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Walton, Lancashire, England: Walton on the Hill, Lancashire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton um 1463 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Langton 44 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Balderston 33. Er hat um 1474 Lady Isabella Gerard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Er starb am 23. August 1500 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England und wurde in Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Lady Isabella Gerard circa 1474. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 10 figlie. Morì il 23 agosto 1500, nel Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newtonが約1463年に生まれた時，父Sir Henry Langtonは44歳，母Elizabeth Balderstonは33歳であった。約1474年にLady Isabella Gerardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼は1500年8月23日にイギリスランカシュアイアワルトン-レ-ダルで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワルトン-レ-ダルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton(이)가 대략 1463년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Langton(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Balderston(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1474년 Lady Isabella Gerard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1500년 8월 23일 영국 랭카실르 월토-레-데일에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 월토-레-데일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton nasceu aproximadamente 1463, seu pai, Sir Henry Langton, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Balderston, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabella Gerard aproximadamente 1474. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 10 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de agosto de 1500, em Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Langton Baron Of Newton родился около 1463 г., его отцу по имени Sir Henry Langton было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Balderston, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabella Gerard около 1474 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 10 дочерей. Он умер 23 августа 1500 г. в местности валтон-ле-деил, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности валтон-ле-деил, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
